Home / Services / Exterior Remodeling

Exterior Remodeling

Boost your curb appeal and protect your Tulsa home with our exterior remodeling services.

Tulsa Remodel & Restoration offers a wide range of exterior remodeling services to enhance the beauty and functionality of your home. We specialize in siding replacement, window and door installations, roofing repairs and replacements, deck and patio construction, and painting. We understand the importance of protecting your home from the elements, especially in Tulsa's climate, which includes hot summers, cold winters, and the risk of tornadoes. We use high-quality materials and expert craftsmanship to ensure that your home is protected and looks its best. We also offer energy-efficient upgrades, such as insulated siding and energy-efficient windows, to help you save money on your energy bills. We are committed to delivering exceptional results that enhance the value of your home and improve your quality of life.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation and Design – We discuss your vision, budget, and desired improvements.
  2. 02 Step 2: Planning and Permitting – We develop detailed plans and obtain necessary permits.
  3. 03 Step 3: Material Selection – We help you choose the best materials for your project, considering durability, aesthetics, and budget.
  4. 04 Step 4: Construction and Installation – We carefully install new siding, windows, doors, roofing, or other exterior features.

Benefits

  • Increased curb appeal
  • Increased home value
  • Improved energy efficiency
  • Protection from the elements

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I replace my siding?

The lifespan of your siding depends on the material, but most siding materials last between 20-50 years. We can inspect your siding and recommend replacement if it is damaged or deteriorating.

What type of roofing material is best for Tulsa?

Asphalt shingles are a popular and cost-effective roofing material for Tulsa homes. We also offer other roofing options, such as metal and tile.

Do you offer warranties on your work?

Yes, we offer warranties on all of our work. The length of the warranty varies depending on the type of project.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with exterior remodeling? Contact us today.
